data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for version control, specifically tracking which version of the waiver was signed. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the existence of version control functionality. The linked use case explicitly states the need for version control, but without concrete evidence or endpoints to verify this, the requirement is deemed unmet.
gaps: Version control functionality is not confirmed as implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
